'''Feynir''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Draedan/Legends|Draedan]] dictator who ruled one of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sesid/Legends|Sesid's]] major nations.

==Biography==
A dictator of a major nation on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sesid/Legends|Sesid]], the [[Draedan/Legends|Draedan]] named [[Feynir]] was a proponent of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Due to his close ties with Imperial [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Arvel Trace]], Feynir was able to arm his military with Imperial-grade weaponry and, after combining forces with neighboring dictator [[Maeril]], the pair laid siege to surrounding nations. Once the planet was conquered, Feynir and Maeril welcomed the Empire to the world to share in the wealth of their conquest.<ref name="GG12" />
